title: Aurora Cannabis (ACB) Stock Forecast & Price Target Analysis
text: Aurora Cannabis price targets and analyst forecasts provide comprehensive outlook for equity investors analyzing cannabis sector opportunities. Key analyst insights: Aurora Cannabis could trend higher into 2026 if company continues showing financial improvements and external winds blow favorably. Reasonable near-term price target among optimistic analysts around C$8-9 (mid-$5 range in USD). Short-term drivers: Stock will likely be driven by quarterly earnings results, execution on cost control, and regulatory news flow. Upcoming earnings announcements serve as immediate catalysts. Risk factors: Political hopes may get delayed or dashed - for example, if rescheduling stalls or new U.S. administration becomes less cannabis-friendly in 2025. Sector could deflate and Aurora's gains could evaporate absent new company-specific positive developments. Stock volatility: Despite recent rally, Aurora's stock relatively low-priced in single digits, attracting retail traders and speculators, adding to volatility. Valuation perspectives: Analysts view Aurora as having attractive valuation relative to revenue growth trajectory and improving profitability metrics. International expansion execution remains key variable in price target justifications. Consensus view reflects cautious optimism on medical cannabis opportunity but recognition that regulatory and political risks remain meaningful headwinds.
